case_title: GINO & CARLO INC. VS LEON WONG CO. INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY GINO & CARLO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEON WONG CO. INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEON WONG CO. INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GINO & CARLO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEON WONG CO. INC. $2,692.92 PRINCIPAL, $9.00 INTEREST, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,739.92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LEON WONG CO. INC.
